channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin, ether bounce is running low on fuel
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 30, 2026

item.title: Midas raises $50 million to tackle pain point for tokenized asset investors
item.description: The funding will support the introduction of an instant redemption system for onchain funds, a key hurdle for broader institutional adoption.

item.title: Coinbase survey finds over half of customers don’t understand crypto tax
item.description: The 2026 Crypto Tax Readiness Report, done with Cointracker, found that only 49% correctly understand that crypto is taxable anytime it is sold.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies, altcoins jump in liquidity-driven relief rally
item.description: Bitcoin and ether tick higher while altcoins surge on oversold bounce, but weak liquidity and macro tensions keep the broader trend fragile.

item.title: Worst six months since 2018? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin prepared its first six straight months of losses since its 2018 bear market as Iran war woes kept markets firmly in check.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes additional $42 million of ether
item.description: About 20,470 ETH, or roughly $42 million, flowed from Ethereum Foundation-linked wallets into the Beacon Chain in a series of coordinated deposits Monday, marking one of the largest visible batches in its ongoing staking rollout.

item.title: Crypto funds see first outflow in 5 weeks amid inflation fears, Iran tensions
item.description: Digital asset products saw $414 million in outflows last week as inflation fears, US Fed rate hike expectations and Middle East tensions drove a shift toward risk-off sentiment.

item.title: Pierre Rochard warns US regulators over Bitcoin gap in Basel rewrite
item.description: Bitcoin Bond Company CEO Pierre Rochard says US regulators’ Basel III revamp cannot quietly decide how banks treat Bitcoin without clearly explaining the rules and evidence behind them.

item.title: Polymarket trader exploits UFC blunder, turns $676 into $67,000 in under a minute
item.description: The episode underscores how quickly prediction market prices can whipsaw on live-event errors.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation accelerates 70,000 ETH staking plan after BitMine sale
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation deployed $46.2 million in ETH across 11 deposits as it accelerates a 70,000 ETH staking plan.

item.title: Anime Bitcoin Community on X - 193 Members - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9vV1k3Z1c3R0pGVnQyOVUxOTVYN1hpN2FuQlpLak9YcUsyTGRSQS11S2RzUkF6VWs1OVlYS0VaWXpPM2pDeHJJZnNORGkzcXlhMUFWQUlza0hBNXgy?oc=5" target="_blank">Anime Bitcoin Community on X - 193 Members…

item.title: FTX payout, U.S. jobs: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 30.

item.title: Great bounce upwards, but nothing confirmed as of yet on #Bitcoin. All depends on macroeconomic events; however, I'd rather see a breakout above $71K for confirmation. On the other hand, a classic little sweep to $65K just before the push upwards would si - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5kUndtMVB2VnBQZm1JMUwyZlhRWjFBNFRNNlljOUZQTmxaaUNoZkd4WW1lbDdEVm5jUWJkUXBUX2NtSkt5Ym1aaFJaZFdsWFVoZUQ5Z3NyRFAyM252Nzc0QVZYaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Great bounce upwards, but nothin…

item.title: White House app sparks concern over location tracking and privacy issues
item.description: The Google Play Store page states that the app collects personal data, such as a phone number, while the App Store directs users to the White House’s privacy policy.

item.title: The Bitcoin market remains boring. Investors chasing yields may be partly to blame
item.description: Yield hungry investors seem to have influenced market flows such that they limit price swings.

item.title: Ethereum price risks falling to $1.2K next, analyst warns
item.description: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bull trap that preceded 45% and 48% drops in the past, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

item.title: THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION IS STAKING ETH The Ethereum Foundation just staked $46.2M of ETH. This is more ETH than they have EVER staked before. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1zSnVpdWtnUEdtN2VkLVpnZjl2Y19kdWw3M3ZXUzI5MkdIRll4MEp1MEJsTlNkZjB0eFA0UnpPYlZzcGFzajhHbXI3ZVppdEVoVTlwLW9fVkhNaFU?oc=5" target="_blank">THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION IS STAKING ETH The …

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $290M as ‘Risk-Off’ Mood Deepens
item.description: Analysts attribute last week's BTC ETF outflows to geopolitical tensions, fading ceasefire hopes, and end-of-quarter rebalancing.

item.title: Bitcoin recovers to $67,400 after dipping below $65,200 as Houthis enter Iran war
item.description: The conflict's fifth week brought its widest expansion yet, with Iran-backed forces opening a new front and U.S. ground troops arriving in the region.

item.title: Polymarket trader makes $67K after UFC announcer briefly mixes up winner
item.description: The Polymarket trader quickly bought $676 worth of one-cent shares in Tyrell Fortune winning the fight after he realized the UFC announcer called out the wrong winner.

item.title: Hyperliquid traders in Tokyo get 200-millisecond edge, Glassnode research shows
item.description: Hyperliquid’s validators cluster in AWS Tokyo alongside Binance, BitMEX and KuCoin, giving nearby traders a latency advantage, Glassnode data shows

item.title: Three Reasons Why Circle’s Stock Is Under Pressure
item.description: A yield ban, a rival's audit, and an unresolved legislative clock have left Circle's stock in limbo for the past week.

item.title: DeFi lender Aave launches on OKX’s Ethereum L2, X Layer
item.description: OKX’s X Layer is the 21st blockchain to integrate Aave, which recently surpassed the $1 trillion mark in cumulative lending volume.

item.title: Fed’s Warsh hearing could come as soon as week of April 13: Punchbowl
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee hearing for the Fed chair nominee is expected around mid-April. Senator Elizabeth Warren has pushed back against the proposed Fed appointment.

item.title: Prediction market transactions surge on geopolitical bets, media coverage
item.description: Monthly notional trading volume for prediction markets has reached roughly $23.7 billion so far in March, up sharply from $1.9 billion at the same time last year.

item.title: Lido DAO proposes $20M LDO buyback to reverse historic price fall
item.description: The LDO token is down 95.9% from its all-time high, with a $255 million market cap, even as Lido’s staking protocol still accounts for the largest share of staked Ether at 23.2%.

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse says crypto has gone from "rat poison" to rewiring the financial system as major companies race to adopt stablecoins and digital assets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5GdlVWQk5ZaWF4OUFkRVBsUnNCS1VLSjVPVGw2Nks5QlgzVlhMbGpCc0NBNGpNOGdYQk9Lel9jdmhUTVBidklqTzJnZVgtMnBxOVlCR1NEV2ExSlZBT2syM1VKRUo?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Ripple CEO Brad Garling…

item.title: BlackRock is hiring a Managing Director of Digital Assets in NYC Role: – Lead crypto, stablecoin, and tokenization strategy – Drive execution across the firm – Work across internal teams + external partners – Own major client relationships Comp: $270K–$350 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5peVBGeXMzZFFnSVdLbi1nZy12Rnp1ellmVGZvaFpZNWlhLUNZeW40V0NlVkRvUkhVLV8weVZraXI5cUktdWV3Y0ttVXloRmpXN3lZc00ybUlGTHJCTnpLSUk3QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BlackRock is hiring a Managing D…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Stablecoin payments go 'invisible' in Southeast Asia as crypto card business surges
item.description: StraitsX, a Singapore-based company, has seen rapid growth in its stablecoin card program, with a 40x surge in transaction volume and an 83x increase in card issuance between 2024 and 2025.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: This is a huge escalation. Israeli/American airforce has bombed the electricity grid in Tehran Iran causing large power outages. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBXTlRwNDJfVTlYQ2p4UDRramxScTVoZUNxRC1NdkpBNjRqY1VhcGViR2RfakwxdHR4X3VLSElsa3dVNmpGbjdfeVRmd3BmdzE4TmxWaU5FV1BSRUVWN0c0RjVR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: This is a huge escalat…

item.title: Strategy may have paused bitcoin accumulation last week, ending a 13-week buying streak
item.description: The company seemed to have skipped its weekly bitcoin purchase announcement for the first time since late December.

item.title: 🔥 ETH: Over 61% of all tokenized assets are on Ethereum, per Token Terminal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1kUEZCYUdSb3cxT21tazJGdGlwZkcta05QODRkaUdjc1QwZ3hROVIwcFNyWFlhY3p5Nkx0T1BZNE5mUEgydU01dGtwYlFSU24wdVlXT01qbG1YWGE2NVVuZDhaN2U?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 ETH: Over 61% of all tokeniz…

item.title: No one is 100% happy with the stablecoin yield agreement: State of Crypto
item.description: The crypto and banking industries saw Senators Alsobrooks and Tillis' agreement-in-principle for stablecoin yield.

item.title: Walmart-backed OnePay adds tokens in push to serve ‘new to crypto’ customers
item.description: The latest token additions include Polygon, Arbitrum and Solana as the app expands its crypto offering for newer users.

item.title: Bitcoin bullish bets hit a 28-month high on Bitfinex, and that's music to bears' ears
item.description: Historically, spikes in Bitfinex BTC/USD longs have acted as a contrary indicator.

item.title: What’s on the Ethereum Roadmap: Glamsterdam, Hegota and Beyond
item.description: Ethereum has rolled out a steady stream of upgrades since 2022. Here’s how those changes fit together—and what’s still ahead.

item.title: Crypto's CLARITY Act could be a headwind for DeFi tokens ring-fencing yield, analyst says
item.description: The proposed restriction on yield would shift value toward regulated players and away from decentralized finance' tokens, 10x Research's Markus Thielen said.

item.title: Ethereum builders propose ‘economic zone’ to tackle L2 fragmentation
item.description: Developers from Gnosis and Zisk propose a framework to connect fragmented rollups, amid growing debate over Ethereum’s scaling model and interoperability challenges.

item.title: Markets move to price in rate hikes as inflation fears and geopolitics reshape Fed expectations
item.description: Middle East tensions have driven divergences across asset markets as oil stays elevated and traditional safe havens falter.

item.title: Bitcoin rn feels like when your parents joined Facebook. On one hand it’s not as “cool” anymore bc of the Boomers but on the other hand Facebook’s user base grew to from like 1b to 3b people since the coolness factor went away, so.. - x.com

item.title: New Ethereum project aims to fix network fragmentation and improve user experience
item.description: The project is designed to make Ethereum’s many layer 2s work together more seamlessly.

item.title: XRP tests $1.33 as rising leverage and weak price action create unstable setup
item.description: Funding spikes and liquidations point to positioning build-up, with direction hinging on whether buyers can defend support.

item.title: Bittensor ecosystem tokens' value hit $1.5 billion as Jensen Huang endorsement supports TAO rally
item.description: The ecosystem's smaller tokens are acting as leveraged bets on TAO, with multiple subnet tokens posting 200-400% monthly gains.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Several AI models have begun misbehaving, disobeying direct commands from humans, and bypassing safeguards. In just 6 months, AI misbehavior has increased by 500%. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1nZHJqM2I2M2RDWWEwUjUwa3QyZjd0aHM1ZzA3eFQ2WDJDYllEenQ0RnZKOVI2V2g3dUFyZ0FKYUFtbmk3U1pRTEhBSGFhdVdiLWlqRVRoaEZCYnBCVDNZTlJR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Several AI models have…

item.title: Xiaomi MiMo v2 Pro Review: The AI Model So Good It Was Mistaken for DeepSeek V4
item.description: Xiaomi's MiMo V2 family arrives quietly but lands hard—a trillion-parameter AI challenger that nobody in the West saw coming.

item.title: Inside Aave’s governance battle as DeFi giant prepares for upgrade
item.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, Aave Labs CEO Stani Kulechov reflected on the governance debates in the Aave ecosystem, as well as what’s to come for the network.

item.title: Sam Altman’s World Foundation sells $65M in WLD as token hits new lows
item.description: World Foundation sold $65 million in WLD as the token hit record lows, with additional supply expected to enter the market.

item.title: Institutions are paying Bitcoin custodians for the privilege of added risk
item.description: Institutions pay custodians for illusory safety. Bitcoin's onchain governance eliminates counterparty risk that traditional models reintroduce.

item.title: Ethereum risks losing No. 2 spot as stablecoins gain ground
item.description: Polymarket odds of Ether losing its No. 2 crypto ranking in 2026 have surged from 17% to over 59%, as stablecoin growth challenges its position.

item.title: Onchain commodity trading is here to stay, but liquidity remains an issue
item.description: Rising oil and gold volumes signal growing demand for onchain macro trading, but limited liquidity and depth still keep traditional markets in control.

item.title: BNP Paribas adds six Bitcoin, Ether ETNs for retail clients in France
item.description: Crypto ETN adoption is spreading across Europe as banks expand offerings and the UK reopens retail access after lifting its ban.

item.title: BREAKING: 🚨 President Trump has approved plans for a ground invasion into Iran, which could last for 2 months, per WSJ. - x.com

item.title: Crypto open to future US crackdowns without clear rules: Coin Center
item.description: The CLARITY Act stalled in the Senate after banks, crypto firms and lawmakers failed to reach an agreement on key provisions like allowing stablecoin yields.

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Goldman Sachs CEO now personally owns Bitcoin after previously dismissing it. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1rakRKMVpJdzhyczNfR1czZUN3ejhXTkF6cWpOcVhIb0xIOTg2UVJZQXpZWXcxSUQyLVVIQ0hBc3oydlpERHo1SkNFMWExTVdfckFSZDItNWw1aGE2Sk9LdURkLUI?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Goldman Sachs CEO now p…

item.title: BNP Paribas, one of Europe’s largest banks, is expanding its trading offering to include six crypto-linked ETNs tied to Bitcoin and Ether for retail clients in France. The products allow investors to gain crypto exposure via securities accounts without directly holdi - x.com

item.title: We've seen it once, in 2018. And now, in 2026, #Bitcoin is heading for six red months in a row. It describes phenomenally why nobody is interested in crypto at this stage, as the previous bull market has been significantly weak, and the bear market has been se - x.com
